aquacroptools 0.1.0
  • Reference

Write AquaCrop Parameter Files for Multiple Years (Batch)

Source: R/write_prm.R
write_prm_batch.Rd

Creates a single .PRM file with header once + multiple year blocks.

Usage

write_prm_batch(
  path = "LIST/",
  station_name,
  planting_schedule,
  crop_name,
  crop_path,
  crop_duration = 90,
  climate_path = "./climate/",
  management_path = "./management/",
  soil_path = "./soil/",
  simulation_start_doy = NULL,
  scenario = "hist",
  eol = "windows",
  use_standalone = TRUE,
  base_path
)

Arguments

path

Output directory path

station_name

Station identifier

planting_schedule

data.frame with: year, planting_doy

crop_name

Crop name (e.g., "maize_90days")

crop_path

Path to crop file directory

crop_duration

Growing season length in days

climate_path

Path to climate file directory

management_path

Path to management file directory

soil_path

Path to soil file directory

simulation_start_doy

Day of year for simulation start

scenario

Climate scenario

eol

End-of-line type

use_standalone

Logical. Whether running in standalone mode

base_path

Character. Base absolute path (required)

Value

Invisibly returns the output file path
